# Anticoagulants (anticoagulants)

**45 rules.** Category: hematology

| `ginkgo` | ingredient_quality_map | avoid | established | Bleeding risk with blood thinners | Ginkgo inhibits platelet aggregation (PAF antagonism). Bleeding risk amplified with warfarin or antiplatelet therapy. |
